channel.title: Unbound on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Unbound on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Ako na domáce home.arpa domény v Unbound
item.description: Vytvorenie zóny: echo 'server: local-zone: "home.arpa." nodefault auth-zone: name: "home.arpa." zonefile: "/etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/home-arpa.zone" for-downstream: yes for-upstream: no ' > /etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/home-arpa.conf Vytvorenie záznamov: echo '$TTL 30 $ORIGIN home.arpa. @ IN SOA ns1.home.arpa. hostmaster.home.arpa. ( 2026022701 ; serial (YYYYMMDDnn) 3600 ; refresh 900 ; retry 1209600 ; expire 300 ) ; negative cache IN NS ns1.home.arpa. # adresa resolvera ns1 IN A 192.168.0.2 ; --- Your requested records --- router IN A 192.168.0.1

item.title: Unbound DNS resolver na Debian-e 13
item.description: Ako nainštalovať DNS-cache server na Debian, konkrétne Unbound. Inštalácia apt install bind9-dnsutils net-tools dns-root-data iproute2 apt install unbound Nastavenie ovládania Remote-control tu vypínam, zakomentované riadky niesú podporované v tejto verzií Unbound. echo 'remote-control: control-enable: no control-interface: /run/unbound.socket #control-use-cert: yes #control-perms: 600 #control-owner: root #control-group: root' > /etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/remote-control.conf Základné nastavenia Tu si dať pozor na ten access-control a pridať tam svoju sieť ak je iná. echo ' server: interface: 0.0.0.0 interface: ::0
